name: AIOA / AOIA-Core
summary: AIOA / AOIA-Core is an early working prototype for local-first, human-gated AI-assisted engineering workflows.
technical_summary: The public prototype explores deterministic routing, provenance-aware context, contradiction tracking, runtime state, and explicit execution gates for local engineering work.
verification_status: Public code and archived record; prototype claims only
next_step: Prepare a reviewer quickstart and a bounded public demonstration.
caution: Do not describe the prototype as production-ready, autonomous, or independently validated.
visual_label: Human gate / runtime state / evidence boundary

supporting_visuals.alt: Abstract AOIA runtime map with policy, evidence, and approval gates
Robotic knowledge ant moving through a linked technical network

name: LSC Research
summary: Exploratory research track. Not confirmed physics. TO VERIFY until reproducibility audit is complete.
technical_summary: A neutrino-related research case study used to structure questions about data provenance, units, covariance, scripts, figures, and reproducibility.
next_step: Run a reproducibility audit covering data, covariance, units, scripts, figures, and the claim matrix.
caution: Do not present the work as confirmed physics or treat model agreement as scientific validation.

supporting_visuals.alt: Scientific cutaway visual connecting the solar core and neutrino research track
Abstract LSC waveform and reproducibility trail

name: MHLM / MDLH
summary: AI-safety research background focused on multi-model hallucination, provenance drift, recursive consensus risk, and model-lineage integrity.
technical_summary: The track frames how agreement between generated outputs can amplify shared errors and why source lineage must remain distinct from model consensus.
next_step: Map research findings to explicit provenance and source-grounding controls.
caution: AI-safety research background. Model agreement is not validation.

supporting_visuals.alt: Abstract provenance and model-lineage control flow
Epistemic control module showing lineage, provenance drift, and human checkpoints

name: Aureon OS — Harmonic Nexus Core
summary: Draft / private review. Not investment advice. Formerly presented as the Aureon Trading System; the platform is now Aureon OS (Harmonic Nexus Core). Requires technical validation and security review.
technical_summary: A grounded AI operating layer for evidence-heavy, high-control work: a switchboard operator and agentic cognition with hard authority boundaries, an organism connectome over the wider codebase, research workflows, generated interfaces, and controlled live-action gates. Presented as a concept pending independent validation.
next_step: Inventory technical documents, proof files, tests, and security boundaries before broader publication.
caution: Do not claim profit, trading performance, investment suitability, or live operational safety.
exists_now: Public repository — Aureon OS (Harmonic Nexus Core)
visual_label: Operator queue / evidence gate / review state
